nodes.name: Coarse Woody Debris on Watershed 6, Hubbard Brook Experimental Forest
nodes.abstract: Fallen dead wood was sampled in Watershed 6 (W6) of the Hubbard Brook   Experimental Forest in 1978, 1995, and 2016. Two techniques, one for   bolewood >3 cm in diameter and one for fallen twigs <3 cm and   > 2 mm, were combined to determine the mass of fallen dead wood in   the forest. The mass of ...

nodes.name: Foliar Ca, Sr and 87Sr/86Sr measurements on Watershed 1     at the Hubbard Brook Experimental Forest, 1999 -     present
nodes.abstract: This dataset includes ICP-OES analyses of Ca and Sr       concentration and thermal ionization mass spectrometry       analyses of 87Sr/86Sr ratios for annual samples of Watershed       1 understory foliage. Additional foliar elements were       analysed and are included in the data table....

nodes.name: Hubbard Brook Experimental Forest: Wind Speed and Wind Direction Measurements, 1965 - ongoing
nodes.abstract: Wind data have been measured by an anemometer mounted 3 m above the ground at Hubbard Brook Experimental Forest Headquarters since 1965. Prior to 1981, every mile of wind movement caused a tick mark on a strip-chart recorder, and wind direction as N, S, E, W, or a combination, was recorded continuou...

nodes.name: Forest Inventory of a Northern Hardwood Forest:     Watershed 6 1965, Hubbard Brook Experimental Forest
nodes.abstract: Forest inventory surveys were initiated in 1965,       repeated in 1977, and repeated at 5 year intervals after       that. This is the initial data set and was collected in       summer of 1965. The inventory consists of a total inventory       of all trees >= 1.5 cm diameter-at-breast-height (dbh)...

nodes.name: Hubbard Brook Experimental Forest Rain Gages: GIS Shapefile
nodes.abstract: These data replace an earlier GIS coverage. Locations have been updated with Trimble GeoXT. Data distributed as shapefile in Coordinate system EPSG:26919 - NAD83 / UTM zone 19N...

nodes.name: Forest Inventory of a Calcium Amended Northern Hardwood Forest: Watershed 1, 2016, Hubbard Brook Experimental Forest
nodes.abstract: In order to evaluate the role of Ca supply in regulating the structure   and function of base-poor forest and aquatic ecosystems, the Ca   content of soil was increased through the application of wollastonite   (CaSiO3) in October 1999. Forest inventory surveys were initiated in   1996 and repeated ...

nodes.name: Fine root production and mortality from minirhizotrons     at the Hubbard Brook Experimental Forest
nodes.abstract: This data set reports observations of fine root growth,       mortality and lifespan in the mature forest. The lifespan       data can be combined with fine root biomass data to estimate       fine root production in the forests (Fahey et al. 2005). This       data set was from reference plots for a...

nodes.name: Hubbard Brook Experimental Forest: Chemistry of Precipitation – Monthly Fluxes, Watershed 9, 1995 - ongoing
nodes.abstract: These data are monthly fluxes of solutes in precipitation collected at the Hubbard Brook Experimental Forest and are a part of the Hubbard Brook Watershed Ecosystem Record (HBWatER), which is a long-term record of stream and precipitation chemistry and volume. The solute fluxes in precipitation are ...

nodes.name: Estimates of productivity and multiple measures of biodiversity at Bartlett and Hubbard Brook Experimental Forests
nodes.abstract: In ecosystems dominated by grasses and other small-statured plants, biodiversity and productivity have generally been found to be positively correlated. However, studies in forested ecosystems have found mixed results. Biodiversity in forests has typically been characterized using indices of species...
